Bash(git -C "C:/Users/user/study" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Merge aws/101 and aws/201 into flat aws/ structure

- Combine overlapping services \(Lambda, S3, CloudFront, DynamoDB\)
  into single comprehensive notes with merged content
- Renumber 201 files to 31-50 to avoid conflicts with 101 files 01-30
- Move agentcore/ to aws/agentcore/
- Update all cross-links across the repo
- Add structural check rule to docs/AGENTS.md
- Update docs/02_navigation.md with flat aws/ structure
- Update aws/00_overview.md and aws/README.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:\\Users\\user\\study" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: Update AWS concept notes \(01-50\) with ISO 8601 dates, navigation header, and footer

- Convert frontmatter dates from YYMMDD-HHMMSS format to ISO 8601 \(YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS\)
- Add recent_editor: CLAUDE field to all frontmatter
- Add navigation header after frontmatter: up link to ./00_overview.md
- Update footer navigation to use ./00_overview.md instead of 00_overview.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/Users/user/study" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Restore AWS console images and fix all note compliance

- Restore 91 PNG files from git history to aws/images/console/
- Update 103 image references in 16 AWS notes to use new path
- Add frontmatter \(timestamps, recent_editor\) to all concept notes
- Add navigation headers with explicit relative path ./00_overview.md
- Fix navigation footers across all domains
- Remove empty aws/201 directory

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/Users/user/study" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor: consolidate docs/ from 11 files to 4

- Merge 01-05 rule files into AGENTS.md
- Remove CODEX.md and KIRO.md \(platform notes now in AGENTS.md\)
- Simplify docs/CLAUDE.md to automation-only
- Simplify root CLAUDE.md to just link to docs/AGENTS.md
- Update docs/README.md to reflect new structure

Reduces duplication of structural information.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Reverting consolidation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
